extraction.one_line_summary: GALL Felix won from breakaway on final steep finish at Courchevel after teammate O'Connor set him up, while VINGEGAARD demolished POGACAR to extend GC lead to 7:35.
tactical_patterns: Jayco executed textbook setup with O'Connor launching Gall from break on final steep pitch then dropping away.
Pogacar early crash same side as pre-race broken wrist cascaded into total collapse on final climb.
Vingegaard's domination exceeded even his own rest day predictions of 'over a minute' gap, suggesting psychological warfare.

rider_signals.GALL Felix: positive: Won after earlier polka dot day and Tour de Suisse GC suggests altitude/form peaking trajectory
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: negative: Touch of wheels crash early stage on damaged wrist side preceded 6-minute collapse on final climb
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: Second place finish after earlier stage win shows sustained climbing form deep in third week
rider_signals.BILBAO Pello: positive: Battled Vingegaard for third on stage suggests UAE alternative GC threat emerging
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: negative: Dropped from early break and straight through peloton indicates severe third-week fatigue despite KOM effort
